title: Totem Utils
description: Totem hotkey, pop overlay and much more >:)
body:
## Mod to improve totem experiences.

![Totem pop screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fe1e8921dfbc780785b94440f521052fc917649.png)

# Features:
- custom **self totem pop sound** (enemy pop sound unchanged)
- **hotkey** to equip totem
- **autototem** with custom **delay**
- able to refill totem on both **offhand** and **mainhand**
- **totem pop overlay**: outline on screen when popped
- **totem count**: show how many totem left
- **replenish item**: replenish item when pressed hotkey
- [new] **curser snap on totem**: move curser to totem when open inventory after popped
- 
Also this my first mod <3

### open to any suggestion/ issues/ question...
join dc server or open issue in github, I'll replay as soon as possible...
